channel.title: The Observability Index
channel.description: The living index of LLM & AI observability tooling — tracing, monitoring, online evaluation, agent observability, and ML-drift detection.

item.title: langfuse/langfuse — momentum 87
item.description: 🪢 Open source AI engineering platform: LLM evals, observability, metrics, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, LangChain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23

item.title: comet-ml/opik — momentum 85
item.description: Debug, evaluate, and monitor your LLM applications, RAG systems, and agentic workflows with comprehensive tracing, automated evaluations, and production-ready dashboards.

item.title: Arize-ai/phoenix — momentum 81
item.description: AI Observability & Evaluation

item.title: traceloop/openllmetry — momentum 79
item.description: Open-source observability for your GenAI or LLM application, based on OpenTelemetry

item.title: pydantic/logfire — momentum 77
item.description: AI observability platform for production LLM and agent systems.

item.title: Agenta-AI/agenta — momentum 77
item.description: The open-source LLMOps platform: prompt playground, prompt management, LLM evaluation, and LLM observability all in one place.

item.title: latitude-dev/latitude-llm — momentum 77
item.description: Latitude is the open-source ai monitoring platform.

item.title: lmnr-ai/lmnr — momentum 75
item.description: Laminar - open-source observability platform purpose-built for AI agents. YC S24.

item.title: Helicone/helicone — momentum 74
item.description: 🧊 Open source LLM observability platform. One line of code to monitor, evaluate, and experiment. YC W23 🍓

item.title: truera/trulens — momentum 74
item.description: Evaluation and Tracking for LLM Experiments and AI Agents

item.title: openlit/openlit — momentum 74
item.description: Open source platform for AI Engineering: OpenTelemetry-native LLM Observability, GPU Monitoring, Guardrails, Evaluations, Prompt Management, Vault, Playground. 🚀💻 Integrates with 50+ LLM Providers, VectorDBs, Agent Frameworks and GPUs.

item.title: evidentlyai/evidently — momentum 73
item.description: Evidently is ​​an open-source ML and LLM observability framework. Evaluate, test, and monitor any AI-powered system or data pipeline. From tabular data to Gen AI. 100+ metrics.

item.title: liaohch3/claude-tap — momentum 72
item.description: Intercept and inspect Coding Agent API traffic from Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor CLI, OpenCode, Kimi, Pi, and Hermes in a local trace viewer.

item.title: Javis603/token-monitor — momentum 70
item.description: Real-time token, cost, and AI limits widget with multi-device sync for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Hermes, OpenClaw, Cursor, and Antigravity. | 为 AI Tools 打造的即时Token、成本与限额监控桌面组件，支持多设备同步

item.title: cvs-health/uqlm — momentum 69
item.description: UQLM: Uncertainty Quantification for Language Models, is a Python package for UQ-based LLM hallucination detection

item.title: JudgmentLabs/judgeval — momentum 69
item.description: The Continuous-Improvement Stack for Agents. Our environment data and evals power agent improvement and monitoring.

item.title: simple10/agents-observe — momentum 69
item.description: Real-time observability of claude code sessions & multi-agents.

item.title: traceroot-ai/traceroot — momentum 66
item.description: TraceRoot - open-source observability and self-healing layer for AI agents. YC S25

item.title: VasiHemanth/tokentelemetry — momentum 65
item.description: Token telemetry dashboard for AI autonomous and coding agents — tracks tokens, sessions, tool calls & reasoning across Hermes agent, Claude Code, Antigravity CLI, Codex & more. 100% local.

item.title: rajudandigam/agent-inspect — momentum 65
item.description: Local execution trees for TypeScript AI agents. agent-inspect helps you understand what happened inside an AI agent run — locally. It turns manual steps, tool calls, LLM calls, structured logs, failures, durations, and run metadata into readable execution trees you can inspect from the terminal. I

item.title: traceloop/openllmetry-js — momentum 64
item.description: Sister project to OpenLLMetry, but in Typescript. Open-source observability for your LLM application, based on OpenTelemetry

item.title: rhesis-ai/rhesis — momentum 64
item.description: The testing platform for AI teams. Bring engineers, PMs, and domain experts together to generate tests, simulate (adversarial) conversations, and trace every failure to its root cause.

item.title: raga-ai-hub/RagaAI-Catalyst — momentum 63
item.description: Python SDK for Agent AI Observability, Monitoring and Evaluation Framework. Includes features like agent, llm and tools tracing, debugging multi-agentic system, self-hosted dashboard and advanced analytics with timeline and execution graph view

item.title: AgentOps-AI/agentops — momentum 63
item.description: Python SDK for AI agent monitoring, LLM cost tracking, benchmarking, and more. Integrates with most LLMs and agent frameworks including CrewAI, Agno, OpenAI Agents SDK, Langchain, Autogen, AG2, and CamelAI

item.title: stainlu/hermes-labyrinth — momentum 63
item.description: Read-only observability plugin for Hermes Agent: journeys, crossings, guideposts, and reports.

item.title: andreisirbu91-lab/MCPSpend — momentum 63
item.description: Real-time cost observability for Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool calls. Wraps any MCP server, attributes spend per tool/project/customer. Free tier 25K calls/mo. EU-hosted

item.title: pezzolabs/pezzo — momentum 62
item.description: 🕹️ Open-source, developer-first LLMOps platform designed to streamline prompt design, version management, instant delivery, collaboration, troubleshooting, observability and more.

item.title: chirpz-ai/pandaprobe — momentum 62
item.description: open source agent engineering platform: traces, evals, and metrics to debug and improve your AI agents. Integrates with LangGraph, CrewAI, Claude Agent SDK, and more.

item.title: nk3750/clawlens — momentum 61
item.description: Agent observability and guardrails for OpenClaw — risk scoring, audit trails, dashboard.

item.title: msfirebird/claw-lens — momentum 60
item.description: Open-source observability dashboard for OpenClaw daemons — cost analyti cs, live monitor ing, and de bugging tools, all running on your own machine.
